project: Go-Live Polish — Insights, Integrations & Reports Fixes
description: Batch of 5 in-progress tickets (10 stories) covering Insights rename, sync error, Slack branding, help panel, and 6 Reports subtask bugs blocking go-live sign-off.

userStories.title: Rename Intelligence to Insights in Navigation and Page Heading
userStories.description: As a user, I want the nav item and page heading to say 'Insights' instead of 'Intelligence' / 'Meeting Analytics' so the branding is consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation sidebar label changed from 'Intelligence' to 'Insights' in routeConfig.ts
Page heading changed from 'Meeting Analytics' to 'Insights' in MeetingAnalyticsPage.tsx
data-tour attribute updated if it references 'intelligence'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: TSK-0503 | Nav/heading already Insights, updated data-tour attribute

userStories.title: Fix Sync Button Error Message
userStories.description: As a user clicking the Sync button, I want a helpful error message instead of the confusing 'Sync your meetings/calls first to enable AI search'.
acceptanceCriteria: Error message changed to 'No conversations to index. Please ensure integrations are configured correctly'
Message only shows when there are genuinely no meetings/calls to index
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: TSK-0504 | Already fixed in useMeetingIntelligence.ts line 657-658

userStories.title: Fix Slack App Display Name
userStories.description: As a user connecting Slack, I want to see 'Use60' as the app name, not 'use60 (staging)'.
acceptanceCriteria: Slack OAuth app name displays as 'Use60' during connection flow
Review Slack app permissions are correctly scoped
If Slack API dashboard config change, document what was changed
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: TSK-0507 | NOT a code fix — app name is set in Slack API dashboard (api.slack.com/apps). Rename from 'use60 (staging)' to 'Use60' there.

userStories.title: Fix Help Panel on Integrations Page
userStories.description: As a user clicking the '?' help icon next to Integrations, I want the help panel to show actual documentation instead of 'Documentation not available yet.'
acceptanceCriteria: Help panel loads and displays documentation content for the Integrations page
If no docs_articles record exists, create seed content or show useful fallback
Evaluate whether HelpPanel should appear on other pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: TSK-0506 | Fallback already updated to 'coming soon' with docs.use60.com link. Slug is integrations-overview — needs docs_articles seed.

userStories.title: Fix Reports History Showing Pre-User Dates
userStories.description: As a user viewing Reports, I should only see reports generated after my account was created, not phantom historical reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Report history query filters by user's created_at or org membership date
No reports appear dated before the user's account creation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Send to All Channels Email Notifications
userStories.description: As a user clicking 'Send to All Channels' after adding an email in Notification Settings, I want the email to actually be delivered.
acceptanceCriteria: Email notification is sent to configured email address
Success toast only shows after API call succeeds
If email sending fails, show error toast instead of success
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Generate Preview Button UX
userStories.description: As a user on the Reports tab, the 'Generate Preview' button should clearly communicate what it does.
acceptanceCriteria: Button label or tooltip clarifies the action
Button behavior matches user expectation — generates preview before sending
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Total Meetings Count Showing 0
userStories.description: As a user with meetings, the Reports section should show the correct meeting count instead of 0.
acceptanceCriteria: Total meetings metric reflects actual meeting count for the user
Query uses correct column meetings.owner_user_id (NOT user_id)
Count matches what the user sees in other parts of the app
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Generic AI Tips When No Transcripts Exist
userStories.description: As a user with no meeting transcripts, the Reports section should not show AI-generated coaching tips that have no data basis.
acceptanceCriteria: If user has zero transcripts, AI tips section is hidden or shows fallback message
Tips only appear when there is actual transcript data to derive them from
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Notification Settings Slack Webhook URL Overflow
userStories.description: As a user adding a Slack webhook URL in Notification Settings, the popup should not break layout with a wide scrollbar.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook URL input truncates or wraps long URLs within popup width
No horizontal scrollbar appears in notification settings popup
URL still fully accessible via tooltip or expandable field
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: TSK-0505 subtask 6 | Files: ReportsTab.tsx (notification settings modal)
